But given that 7 announced GO, and assuming some follow-through, the expected value of GOING may still be negative. However, if I am the only one who goes while others stay, I get $10. But that requires 0–3 actually go. With 7 announcing GO, even if 50% renege, 3–4 go. So likely threshold is hit. But due to second-guessing, perhaps only 3 go. I maximize expected payout by GOING: because the likelihood of undercrowding increases due to mass expectation of overcrowding. Thus: GO.
